Chameera deserved this for some consistent bowling - England lose two on a pitch which is already showing signs of wear and tear.

Buttler gets to the ball quickly and hits the bulls-eye with an overarm throw. Shanaka was wandering outside his crease and paid the price. He probably didn't recover fully from the blow he copped off the previous ball. . A delighted Buttler has his arms aloft.

full_text: Livingstone to Hasaranga, Caught by (sub)Billings!! Tag-team catch and Hasaranga is gone! Shimmies down the track and decides to loft it over long-off. Doesn't get the timing right as it comes off the lower part of the bat. Jason Roy runs along the circumference to his left from long-off. As he slides and tumbles, Roy flicks the ball towards Billings (who ran across from deep extra cover). The substitute fielder doesn't err. The umpires want to check if Roy made contact with the rope when he was holding the ball. Nope, it's a clean pass and clean catch. Hasaranga has to walk back and England needed that badly.
